zh.West Woodhay, Berkshire, England: 英國波克夏韋斯特 武德海
zh.lifeSummary: John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire是Roger Cheney Esquire的兒子，於大約1481年出生在英國波克夏韋斯特 武德海。他於大約1509年與Jane Norreys在英國波克夏亞頓登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1545年享年65歲。

zh-hans.West Woodhay, Berkshire, England: 英国波克夏韋斯特 武德海
zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire是Roger Cheney Esquire的儿子，于大约1481年出生在英国波克夏韋斯特 武德海。他于大约1509年与Jane Norreys在英国波克夏亞頓登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1545年享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire was born about 1481, in West Woodhay, Berkshire, England as the son of Roger Cheney Esquire. He married Jane Norreys about 1509, in Yattendon, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1545, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire est né environ 1481, à West Woodhay, Berkshire, Angleterre, fils de Roger Cheney Esquire. Il a épousé Jane Norreys environ 1509, à Yattendon, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1545, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire wurde um 1481 in West Woodhay, Berkshire, England, als Sohn von Roger Cheney Esquire geboren. Er hat um 1509 in Yattendon, Berkshire, England Jane Norreys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1545 im Alter von 65 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire è nato il circa 1481 nel West Woodhay, Berkshire, England come figlio di Roger Cheney Esquire. Lui sposato Jane Norreys circa 1509, nel Yattendon, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1545, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshireは約1481年にイギリスバークシュアイアウエスト ウッドヘイでRoger Cheney Esquireの息子として生まれた。約1509年にイギリスバークシュアイアヤッテンドンでJane Norreysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1545年に65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire(은)는 대략 1481년 영국 버크실르 웨스트 우드하이에서 Roger Cheney Esquire의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1509년 영국 버크실르 야텐던에서 Jane Norreys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1545년 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire nasceu aproximadamente 1481, em West Woodhay, Berkshire, Inglaterra filho de Roger Cheney Esquire. Ele casou-se com Jane Norreys aproximadamente 1509, em Yattendon, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1545, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire родился около 1481 г. в местности вест вудхеи, биркшир, Англия. Его отца звали Roger Cheney Esquire. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Norreys около 1509 г. в местности яттендон, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1545 г. в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire nació aproximadamente 1481, en West Woodhay, Berkshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Roger Cheney Esquire. Se casó con Jane Norreys aproximadamente 1509, en Yattendon, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1545, a la edad de 65 años.
